networking.subject: Hey Nice to meet you
networking.body: Hey {name} I saw you work at {company}, I would love to know more.

CS advice.subject: Advice for CS
CS advice.body: Hello {name}, nice to meet you. I saw you were working at {company} and wanted to know more. Would love to hop on a call any time your free
